ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_incidents" (
  "incident_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each crime incident */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the crime incident was reported */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Law enforcement agency that reported the incident */,
  "falls_within" TEXT /* Jurisdiction where the incident occurred */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "location" TEXT /* Description of the incident location */,
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* LSOA code for the incident location */,
  "lsoa_name" TEXT /* LSOA name for the incident location */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Outcome of the investigation (e.g., Investigation complete; no suspect identified) */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "victim_name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "victim_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the victim */,
  "suspect_name" TEXT /* Name of the suspect */,
  "suspect_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the suspect */,
  "investigation_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation started */,
  "investigation_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation ended */,
  "witness_name" TEXT /* Name of the witness */,
  "witness_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the witness */,
  "evidence_description" TEXT /* Description of the evidence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_outcome_type FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_type") REFERENCES investigation_outcomes ("outcome_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES law_enforcement_agencies ("agency_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_enforcement_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each law enforcement agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the law enforcement agency */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction where the agency operates */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "agency_status" TEXT /* Status of the agency (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the crime (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* LSOA code for the location */,
  "lsoa_name" TEXT /* LSOA name for the location */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "geozone" TEXT /* Geographical zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigation_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the investigation outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investigation outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was determined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., law enforcement officer, analyst) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" TEXT /* ID of the crime incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each crime incident
Month the crime incident was reported

LSOA code for the incident location
